summary: Reposted NewsNation segment about border surveillance. The frame shows a daytime exterior with a tracked excavator working on cleared ground beside a tall steel section of border wall, with desert brush and a hillside behind. A NewsNation lower-third reads 'CAMERAS TRACKING MOVEMENT AT THE BORDER.' The audio is a reporter describing new camera towers that give agents instant alerts of crossings.

script.scene: Tracked excavator on cleared ground beside a steel border-wall section in desert terrain; chyron 'CAMERAS TRACKING MOVEMENT AT THE BORDER.'
